field_values.action_summary: Realizing he is a wanted man, Carter waits for nightfall. He utilizes his superhuman strength and agility to leap from a palace balcony, escaping into the city of Zodanga.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots (scale of leap); Tracking shots (descent movement); Extreme Long Shots (disappearing into city)
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Contrast between palace interior light and Zodangan avenue glow
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH022_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish the character's transition from a hunted fugitive to an active agent of escape by utilizing superhuman physical capabilities. The sequence must emphasize the verticality and scale of the palace architecture against the sprawling Zodangan cityscape at night.

## Required Cast
- john_carter

## Required Environments
- zodanga_palace_interior balcony
- overlooking Zodangan avenue/cityscape at night

## Continuity Constraints
- Nightfall lighting transition
- Contrast between palace interior light and Zodangan avenue glow

## Beat List
- BT001: Waiting for nightfall
- BT002: The Leap
- BT003: Escape into Zodanga
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
